privileged_info_summary: The task uses Nx Witness VMS 5.1.5.39242, an active video management system by Network Optix. All data is synthetic, generated locally with virtual test cameras named 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Entrance Camera'. The API endpoint /rest/v1/userRoles is the correct Nx Witness REST API for role management. Authentication uses Bearer tokens obtained from POST /rest/v1/login/sessions with admin credentials. The specified permission identifiers (GlobalViewLivePermission, GlobalViewArchivePermission, GlobalAdminPermission, GlobalExportPermission, GlobalEditCamerasPermission) follow a reasonable naming convention consistent with Nx Witness patterns (e.g., 'NoGlobalPermissions'), but cannot be verified against any public Nx Witness documentation or API reference materials.
